title: Anthropic's Claude Tag: 60% Interact This Way! #shorts
summary: A YouTube video discussing Claude Tag, a tool used internally at Anthropic for interacting with Claude. The video suggests Claude Tag accounts for 60% of how interactions with Claude occur internally.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof covers Claude Tag, a tool used internally at Anthropic for interacting with Claude. The central claim is that Claude Tag accounts for about 60% of how internal interactions with Claude take place. The takeaway is a single data point about Anthropic's internal usage patterns, framed around prompt engineering practices.
